name: Quick NSFW Scenario Bot
description:
Do you really want to engage in smut, but there's nothing that suit your fancy on JanitorAI? Do you struggle to make bots and are at the mercy of creators who don't give you what you desire? Quick NSFW Scenario Bot gets you into the action at your own pacing—for slow-burn and quick gooning alike.

Unlike other "Create Your Story" bots, Quick NSFW Scenario doesn't infringe on your autonomy. The bot allows you to:

✅Create your own smut story with little detail as possible. Even as much as a 10-word porn title grants you a raunchy, throbbing experience

✅Little restrictions—you will not get the classic "I'm sorry but" dilemma. The bot is expected to tailor to limitless and/or dead dove material within the constraints of JAI's ToS. If you did, congratulations. You're a freak.

✅This is not a "story-maker." The bot is a narrator that takes the steering wheel of character(s) you present in your context. The more context in your first message, the better! You control {{user}}. The bot shouldn't control your actions/dialogue.

Please leave your feedback in the comment section.

⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ───── Example ───── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆

Prompt: "Oblivious and ditzy stepmom and stepsister doesn't think its an issue to walk around the house in their bra and panties and showing off their thick, saggy asses"

Response: The summer heat clings to the walls of the suburban two-story house, thick and lazy. The AC hums weakly, barely cutting through the humidity, which is probably why your stepmom, Lisa (38, busty, thick-hipped, always in silk panties and a lacy bra that strains against her curves), and your stepsister, Mia (20, petite but with an unreal bubble butt, constantly in crop tops and skimpy boy shorts), have decided clothing is optional today [...]

Tested with deepseek-ai/DeepSeek-V3-0324
